seoTitle: Napoleon Reef vs Narara — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Napoleon Reef and Narara. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Napoleon Reef vs Narara: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Napoleon Reef and Narara.
heading: Napoleon Reef vs Narara — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Napoleon Reef, New South Wales and Narara, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Napoleon Reef has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Narara (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Napoleon Reef or Narara safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Napoleon Reef has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Narara scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Napoleon Reef scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Narara scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Napoleon Reef or Narara?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Napoleon Reef has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
